summary: A bounded real Hermes public-safety-gate worker ran the factory public safety and secret safety scanners in a disposable public-safe workspace, produced a structured public_safety_result, and completed through kanban_complete.
scope: real Hermes runtime, public-safety-gate worker, scanner-backed specialist output quality, disposable public-safe workspace
limits: This proof satisfies specialist_output_quality for the current production preflight only for the bounded public-safety-gate scanner path.
It does not prove every future specialist worker, external SaaS, Discord, cloud, browser, GitHub mutation or scanner credential path.
The complete update receipt must still prove the target Hermes worker workspace receives these scanner scripts through the release package.
Raw runtime output, local paths, runtime ids, session files and provider logs are intentionally not stored in the public repository.
